metadata.description: Short name prefix for all resources (lowercase, 3-20 chars).
VM size. B2s (2 vCPU, 4 GB, ~$30/mo) is the default; B2ms (2 vCPU, 8 GB) for heavier load; B1s (1 vCPU, 1 GB, ~$8/mo) for tiny firms.
inchambers.ai org UUID this gateway serves.
Public hostname the gateway will be reachable at. Must point to the VM's public IP for Let's Encrypt certs. Leave empty to use the VM's Azure-assigned DNS name.
Email for Let's Encrypt cert registration.
SSH public key (paste contents of ~/.ssh/id_rsa.pub or id_ed25519.pub).
Base64-encoded 32-byte master key for encrypting subscription cookies at rest. Generate: openssl rand -base64 32
LiteLLM admin key (random secret). Generate: "sk-$(openssl rand -hex 24)"
Optional OpenRouter API key. Leave empty to configure later via the admin UI.
Optional Azure AI Foundry resource URL.
Optional Azure AI Foundry API key.
Browser origin allowed to call the gateway.
JWKS URL for validating inchambers.ai JWTs.
Container registry + tag. Default pulls public images from GHCR; override for BYO-registry deployments.
Gateway image tag. Pin to a specific version for production; `latest` tracks the stable release.

variables.cloudInit:
#cloud-config
package_update: true
package_upgrade: true
packages:
  - ca-certificates
  - curl
  - gnupg
runcmd:
  - curl -fsSL https://get.docker.com | sh
  - usermod -aG docker azureuser
  - mkdir -p /opt/inchambers-gateway/caddy
  - curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/inchambers-ai/gateway-deploy/main/docker-compose.yaml -o /opt/inchambers-gateway/docker-compose.yaml
  - curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/inchambers-ai/gateway-deploy/main/caddy/Caddyfile -o /opt/inchambers-gateway/caddy/Caddyfile
  - curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/inchambers-ai/gateway-deploy/main/caddy/Caddyfile.notls -o /opt/inchambers-gateway/caddy/Caddyfile.notls
  - |
    cat > /opt/inchambers-gateway/.env <<ENV
    GATEWAY_ORG_ID=__ORG_ID__
    GATEWAY_DOMAIN=__GATEWAY_DOMAIN__
    CADDY_TLS_MODE=auto
    CADDY_ACME_EMAIL=__ADMIN_EMAIL__
    ALLOWED_ORIGIN=__ALLOWED_ORIGIN__
    JWKS_URL=__JWKS_URL__
    GATEWAY_MASTER_KEY=__GATEWAY_MASTER_KEY__
    LITELLM_MASTER_KEY=__LITELLM_MASTER_KEY__
    OPENROUTER_API_KEY=__OPENROUTER_API_KEY__
    AZURE_FOUNDRY_URL=__AZURE_FOUNDRY_URL__
    AZURE_FOUNDRY_KEY=__AZURE_FOUNDRY_KEY__
    PG_PASSWORD=__PG_PASSWORD__
    REGISTRY=__IMAGE_REGISTRY__
    IMAGE_TAG=__IMAGE_TAG__
    ENV
  - chmod 600 /opt/inchambers-gateway/.env
  - chown -R azureuser:azureuser /opt/inchambers-gateway
  - cd /opt/inchambers-gateway && docker compose pull && docker compose up -d

osProfile.customData: [base64(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(replace(variables('cloudInit'), '__ORG_ID__', parameters('orgId')), '__GATEWAY_DOMAIN__', if(empty(parameters('gatewayDomain')), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', format('{0}-pip', parameters('name'))), '2023-11-01').dnsSettings.fqdn, parameters('gatewayDomain'))), '__ADMIN_EMAIL__', parameters('adminEmail')), '__ALLOWED_ORIGIN__', parameters('allowedOrigin')), '__JWKS_URL__', parameters('jwksUrl')), '__GATEWAY_MASTER_KEY__', parameters('gatewayMasterKey')), '__LITELLM_MASTER_KEY__', parameters('litellmMasterKey')), '__OPENROUTER_API_KEY__', parameters('openRouterApiKey')), '__AZURE_FOUNDRY_URL__', parameters('foundryUrl')), '__AZURE_FOUNDRY_KEY__', parameters('foundryKey')), '__PG_PASSWORD__', uniqueString(resourceGroup().id, parameters('name'), 'pg')), '__IMAGE_REGISTRY__', parameters('imageRegistry')), '__IMAGE_TAG__', parameters('imageTag')))]

dnsHint.value: [if(empty(parameters('gatewayDomain')), format('Using Azure-assigned DNS: {0}. First curl after boot may take ~2 min for Docker pull + cold start.', reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', format('{0}-pip', parameters('name'))), '2023-11-01').dnsSettings.fqdn), format('Point DNS: {0} → {1}. Let''s Encrypt provisions the cert on first HTTPS request.', parameters('gatewayDomain'), reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', format('{0}-pip', parameters('name'))), '2023-11-01').ipAddress))]
